Software Engineer Position

We are seeking a talented software engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate will be a rockstar developer who can code like a ninja and handle the technical challenges with ease.

Requirements:
- Strong technical skills in backend development
- Ability to work as part of a brotherhood of developers
- Must be a hard-working guy who can handle pressure
- Experience with modern frameworks

The selected salesman... err, engineer will be responsible for client-facing technical demonstrations and maintaining our codebase.

Benefits include competitive salary and opportunities for the whole team including the company chairman and his wife.
